title: Merge and verify PR #78 score validation contract
description:
## Summary
Land/adapt PR #78 score validation support in this branch and verify runtime behavior.

## Purpose
Use the score validation contract (including `valid_classes`) as a stable prerequisite for downstream dataset balancing work.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Validation configuration is usable in score YAML in this repo.
- Tests pass for the class-validation path.
- No schema migration is required for this PR #78 validation contract work.
- Findings and verification output are logged in Kanbus comments.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Execution order gate activated: this sub-task is now in progress and is the prerequisite for class-resolver/balancing work.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation pass for PR #78 gate. I verified current  does not contain automatic Score.Result validation wiring yet. Next steps: add runtime validation contract in Score base class, add targeted tests, update score YAML docs, and run focused pytest for validation path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation pass for PR #78 gate. Verified that Score base class currently lacks automatic Score.Result validation wiring. Next: add runtime validation contract in Score base class, add targeted tests, update score YAML docs, and run focused pytest for the validation path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented PR #78 validation gate in-tree. Added automatic Score.Result validation in Score base class via parameters.validation contract (value/explanation rules), including valid_classes/patterns/min/max-length enforcement and invalid-regex parse errors. Added focused test suite at tests/scores/test_score_validation.py and updated score YAML docs with validation examples/behavior. Verification: pytest -q tests/scores/test_score_validation.py plexus/scores/Score_test.py -q => pass; python -m py_compile plexus/scores/Score.py tests/scores/test_score_validation.py => pass. Confirmed no GraphQL/schema migration needed for this feature since behavior is runtime/YAML-driven in score execution layer.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: PR #78 validation contract merged/adapted and verified in this branch.
